name: project managers in marketing agencies processing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For project managers in marketing agencies processing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient report generation causes missed deadlines. We provide customized reports and dashboards instead of manual report creation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: project managers in marketing agencies processing 5–15 projects/month
